data.acceptance: 1. add_wave/remove_wave/move_wave functions work on ExecutionPlanData. 2. add_step/remove_step/move_step functions work on waves. 3. renumber_waves and renumber_steps maintain contiguous indices. 4. remove operations return CascadeInfo with affected knot_ids. 5. App methods acquire locks and emit correct events. 6. All functions have unit tests. 7. Coverage >= 95%.
